cards.title: Integrative Pain Management
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Biopsychosocial model: Bio + Psycho + Social factors
  • Pain neuroscience education (PNE) key concepts
  • Central sensitisation: Assessment & management
  • Protocol by condition: LBP, fibromyalgia, neuropathy
  • Supplements: PEA, Mg, curcumin, omega-3
